fixtures.clause: CONFORMANCE.md §Basic — core-only governance DECISION is valid
fixtures.rationale: Governance-only DECISION with no action and no profile validates against the core schema.
Core-only DECISION at _schema_version 2.1.0 validates against the core schema.

fixtures.clause: CONFORMANCE.md §Basic / SPECIFICATION.md — DECISION MUST NOT contain an 'outcomes' field
fixtures.rationale: Outcomes are expressed only via linked OUTCOME records; an embedded 'outcomes' field must be rejected.

fixtures.clause: SPECIFICATION.md §record_type — reserved/unknown record_type MUST be rejected
fixtures.rationale: record_type is an enum of DECISION|OUTCOME|CHECKPOINT; any other value must be rejected.

fixtures.clause: Core schema — required field 'record_id' MUST be present
fixtures.rationale: record_id is a required identity-envelope field.

fixtures.clause: Core schema — _schema_version MUST be a supported v2.x value
fixtures.rationale: The v2.x core schema accepts only 2.0.0 and 2.1.0; legacy 1.1.0 records are not validated by the reference validator.

fixtures.clause: CONFORMANCE.md §Basic — E4: a DECISION with an 'action' section MUST carry a 'profile' field
fixtures.rationale: Operational (action-bearing) decisions must declare a domain profile.

fixtures.clause: CONFORMANCE.md §Standard — first FINAL OUTCOME for a parent in the store is valid
fixtures.rationale: A FINAL OUTCOME whose parent_id exists in the store and which has no prior FINAL is accepted.

fixtures.clause: SPECIFICATION.md / validator store invariant — OUTCOME parent_id MUST reference an existing record
fixtures.rationale: An OUTCOME whose parent_id is not present in the store must be rejected.

fixtures.clause: CONFORMANCE.md §Standard — FINAL uniqueness: only one FINAL OUTCOME per parent chain
fixtures.rationale: A second FINAL OUTCOME for a parent that already has a FINAL must be rejected.

fixtures.clause: CONFORMANCE.md §Standard (v2.1.0+) — stored record carries store-assigned sequence_number
fixtures.rationale: In stored mode, a record bearing a sequence_number is valid.

fixtures.clause: CONFORMANCE.md §Standard (v2.1.0+) — stored records MUST carry a sequence_number
fixtures.rationale: In stored mode, a record missing sequence_number must be rejected.

not_covered.reason: Write-time store behavior; the static validator accepts a submitted sequence_number, so this cannot be decided statically.

not_covered.clause: Writes OUTCOME records when outcomes are realized
not_covered.reason: Runtime write behavior, not a static record property.

not_covered.clause: Canonical read protocol and GET /records/{id}/state API
Per-record SHA-256 via RFC 8785 (JCS) at write
not_covered.reason: Write-time integrity computation; not present as a static record field in fixtures.
Operational retention policy, not statically decidable.

not_covered.clause: Third-party audit access to records and state API
Merkle tree computation per RFC 6962 §2.1 / SPECIFICATION §7.7
not_covered.reason: Requires the implementation to expose its tree; needs the Layer 2 adapter.

not_covered.clause: CHECKPOINT emission cadence (>= every 1000 records or 24h)
Inclusion proof API GET /records/{id}/proof and verification
not_covered.reason: Runtime API + proof verification against checkpoint roots.
Capture behavior; presence alone does not establish conformance.
Metric computation behavior, not a static record property.
Requires the implementation to expose checkpoints and proofs; needs the Layer 2 adapter.

not_covered.clause: ODS-Finance/v1 profile conformance and OUTCOME profile consistency (C4)
not_covered.reason: Profile-level static fixtures ship in SD-3.
